provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against claude. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
TDD grew out of Kent Beck's work on Extreme Programming in the late 1990s, when he rediscovered test-first programming and codified it in 'Test-Driven Development: By Example'.
The phrase red-green-refactor describes the cycle's rhythm: a failing test shows red, the minimal implementation turns the bar green, and the refactor step cleans up while staying green.
